name: vesa
description: VESA FDMI/MIS flat-display mounting hole patterns (MIS-D 75x75, MIS-D 100x100, MIS-E 200x100), M4 fastener + ISO-273-referenced clearance dia. See RESEARCH.md for per-pattern evidence and tiering.
sources: VESA FDMI/MIS mounting standard — named standard, not fetched (member-paywalled); backs MIS spacings [B] via published peers
